log.context:
Both GIFs are live in Discord. Here's what was built and posted:

**Option A** (`the-kid_a.gif`) — neon yellow blur streak. 14-frame animation. A stick figure blazes left-to-right, almost entirely motion trail — hot yellow/orange smear, barely-there body, white flash afterimage, then empty frame. Frame timing drops to 20ms at peak. Repeats before you've parsed it.

**Option B** (`the-kid_b.gif`) — electric cyan freeze frame. 15-frame animation. The figure is hyper-crisp, frozen mid-stride at max...(truncated)
